name: Sparkling Lemon Ice
recipeIngredient: 1 package Sugar-Free JELL-O Brand - Lemon Flavor Gelatin
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the gelatin with the boiling water, seltzer, lemon juice, and lemon peel.
2. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch square pan and cover it.
3. Freeze for 3 hours or until firm.
4. Let it stand at room temperature for 10 minutes.
5. Beat or process until smooth.
6. Spoon into 6 dessert glasses.
